Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF VIGILANT INSURANCE COMPANY Motion for Order to Permit Filing of First Amended Complaint to Substitute Correct Name of Plaintiff for Inadvertent Incorrect Name, and to Deem Such Substitution Made in Pleadings and Papers Filed with the Court, and to re-title actions (Per Stipulation). No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/AJR) Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Continued To Apr-30-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 611

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-06-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SELF-HELP FOR THE ELDERLY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Steven H. Yuster, Esq. of Bragg & Kuluva (213) 612-5335, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Counsel represents to the Court that the moving party will not be appearing. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. The Housekeeping agreement does not contain any language that extends insurance coverage to defendant. The terms of the insurance policy do not extend coverage to defendant. (Order re: Plaintiff's objections to evidence signed.) Also, Order signed in open Court regarding the Court's ruling on the motion.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
